text.title: Multi-Agent Spec Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the multi-agent design spec the methodology emits — roster, pattern, message schema, budgets, termination, decision authority.

list.item: Two agents whose `role` fields share ≥3 of the same significant nouns (overlap detected by validator).
Any agent without `token_budget` or `timeout_s` (per-agent budget rule r6).

example.code: task: "Produce a 1500-word internal explainer on AI Act compliance for the engineering blog" pattern: sequential decision_authority: orchestrator agents: - name: researcher role: "Gather and summarise public sources on AI Act Articles 5/6/9 relevant to product" model: sonnet system_prompt: "You are a research specialist; output strict JSON {findings[], sources[], confidence}" token_budget: 6000 timeout_s: 90 - name: writer role: "Compose the 1500-word explainer from researcher findings; no new claims" model: sonnet system_prompt: "You are a technical writer; output {draft_markdown, word_count}" token_budget: 8000 timeout_s: 120 - name: editor role: "Tighten clarity, fix factual drift against findings" model: opus system_prompt: "You are a senior editor; output {final_markdown, change_log}" token_budget: 5000 timeout_s: 90 message_schema: schema_version: v1 fields: [schema_version, from, to, payload, ts] budget: {total_tokens: 25000, wallclock_s: 360} termination: {kind: shape_check, predicate: "result.final_markdown != null AND result.word_count >= 1400"}

list.item: No two agents share >2 significant role nouns.
Every agent has a non-empty system prompt ≥32 chars.
`decision_authority` is one of the four canonical values.
